_description: Final estimates -- Mexico vs England R16 2026-07-05/06

questions.question: Will Harry Kane (England) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Market mid=0.3623. Scored in 3/4 games; explicitly NOT suppressing for a 'Mexico plays like Ghana' worry -- that overfit already cost -26.27 and -11.36 once this campaign.

questions.question: Will Jude Bellingham (England) have 2 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Market mid=0.1742 looks anchored to his Ghana blank. He hit the threshold in the Croatia AND the Congo DR (deep-block) games -- 2 of 4 overall. Bumped meaningfully above market as a deliberate correction of the named Ghana-analogy overfit.

questions.question: Will England advance to the quarterfinals?
Will Raúl Jiménez (Mexico) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Illiquid market offer=0.2532 (adj. 0.2393). Scored in 2 of 3 appearances when featured; small nudge up.

questions.question: Will Julián Quiñones (Mexico) have 1 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Illiquid market offer=0.5682 (adj. 0.5369). Has recorded 1+ SOT in literally every game this tournament (4/4) -- a personal floor, bumped confidently above market.

questions.question: Will the match be tied at halftime?
questions.note: HT Draw mid=0.4832 -- the highest HT-draw signal seen in a while, consistent with RULE8 firing hard (match-level draw also 31%).

questions.question: Will there be 4 or more total cards shown in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will England have more corner kicks than Mexico in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Most_corners England mid=0.5989 -- consistent with England's very stable 8/9/7 corner history and Mexico's structurally low 1.67/game corner rate.

questions.question: Will a goal be scored after the second hydration break in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: No direct market. Total-goals lambda (2.288) scaled to the ~69'-93' window -> 0.446. Shaded within the established 0.45-0.55 caution band for late-window no-market timing questions (historically the worst-performing question category when priced far from that band).

questions.question: Will England have 5 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: DELIBERATE Cluster-B discipline: this is the SAME team/question type that already lost -11.36 RBP once this campaign (ENG-CDR '7+ SOT') from an upward empirical blend. Market-fit is 0.387; staying at market rather than repeating the mistake a second time on the same team.

questions.question: Will the match be decided by a penalty shootout?
Will both teams score in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will there be more total cards than total goals in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Compound Poisson comparison of independently-fitted cards lambda (3.261) and goals lambda (2.288) -> P(cards > goals)=0.577.

questions.question: Will there be 18 or more total shots (on and off target) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
questions.note: Fitted lambda=21.29 from the only available market line (OU21.5) -> P(>=18)=0.791. High-confidence, market-anchored, not an empirical override.

questions.question: Will the match have 2 or fewer total goals in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
